text:
On Sat, 31 Dec 2011 07:50:01 -0800
Adrian Chadd <adrian@freebsd.org> wrote:

> So where in the logfile did it stop working?

I dumped the log as soon as I noticed I wasn't receiving multicast anymore, but I do see that there was no changes in the log messages after I started the capture (at this time, I was still receiving multicast message).

I am a bit puzzled here, it seems that the multicast do work by intermitance, but I'm unable at this time to confirm what triggers the problem. Next week, I will try to do a small server/client couple that send/recv multicast message and logs with timestamps...

-- 
Matthieu Volat <matthieu.volat@gmail.com>
